entity.label: Unni
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite who returned with Zerubbabel from the Captivity (Neh. 12:9).

nodes.label: Unni
nodes.description: A Levite who returned with Zerubbabel from the Captivity (Neh. 12:9).

verses.text: Also Bakbukiah and Unni, their brethren, were over against them in the watches.
